stream_samples.text: Walmart+ pickup slot for grocery showing 'unavailable' for 3 days straight in Dallas. canceled my membership.
App says item is in stock at my store, get there, employee says we haven't carried it in 6 months. App is lying.
Why does Walmart's grocery pickup keep substituting items I marked 'do not substitute'?
[#WMT-44120 P1] Pickup ETA in app shows 1pm slot, customer arrives, told slot was full hours ago
self-checkout at walmart asked me to scan my receipt before I'd even paid. system is broken
Walmart Connect double-charges when I edit a campaign mid-flight. support says 'expected behavior'.
Marketplace sellers reporting onboarding stuck on tax verification step since the v3 form rolled out
WIC EBT integration broken in my state for the last 2 weeks, just shows 'try again later'
App inventory accuracy in TX dropped to 84% this week, vs 92% baseline. p99 store-level errors up 3x.
Walmart app crashes every time I try to add a credit card. Pixel 8, Android 14.
actually walmart+ saved me $40 on tires this week. credit where due.
is anyone else's Walmart pharmacy refill button greyed out for active scripts?
Spark (driver app) directing dashers to wrong loading dock at 4 superstores in Houston
[grocery-pickup] slot allocation lambda timing out at p95 > 8s during peak windows in TX/CA
tried to return something with the receipt I have right here, app says order not found

clusters.title: Walmart+ pickup slot availability in tier-1 metros
App inventory accuracy mismatch with store reality
Walmart Connect double-billing on campaign edits
WIC EBT integration broken in select states
Spark driver app loading-dock routing errors

top_epic.title: Recover Walmart+ pickup slot availability in tier-1 metros
top_epic.rationale: 2,580 signals from Walmart+ members and store ops point at a single failure: slot allocation lambda timing out >8s during peak windows in TX, CA and TX-adjacent metros, surfacing as 'unavailable' slots that customers can't book. App inventory accuracy in the same regions has slipped from 92% to 84% — compounding the trust hit that drives the cancel-membership signal in the X feed.
top_epic.verdict: Membership-critical — pickup is the load-bearing benefit of the Walmart+ subscription.
top_epic.recommendation: Restore slot fill rate, fix the inventory reconciliation lag, and surface accurate slot ETAs before scaling the new substitution logic.
acceptance_criteria: Slot fill rate ≥ 95% in DFW, Houston, LA and Phoenix metros for 7 consecutive days
Slot allocation lambda p95 latency < 2s during peak booking windows
Customer-facing slot ETA reconciles with inventory mutations within 60s
Auto-reroute to overflow stores when primary slot capacity is exceeded

evidence.quote: Walmart+ pickup slot for grocery is showing 'unavailable' for 3 days straight in Dallas. Canceled my membership.
Slot allocation lambda timing out at p95 > 8s during peak windows in TX/CA.
App inventory accuracy in TX dropped to 84% this week, vs 92% baseline.

confluence.title: PRD · Walmart+ pickup slot availability recovery
